scripts.lint: eslint "packages/**/*.ts" "services/**/*.ts" "infra/cdk/src/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "tests/contract/*.mjs" "tests/certificado/*.mjs" "tests/db/*.mjs" "tests/golden/*.mjs" "tests/handler/*.mjs" "tests/integration/*.mjs" "tests/integration/localstack/*.mjs" "tests/integration/retry/*.mjs" "tests/pki/*.mjs" "tests/returns/*.mjs" "tests/soap/*.mjs" "tests/xml/*.mjs" && node scripts/check.mjs lint && node scripts/check-migrations.mjs lint:migrations
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && node --test tests/contract/*.test.mjs tests/certificado/*.test.mjs tests/golden/*.test.mjs tests/handler/*.test.mjs tests/pki/*.test.mjs tests/returns/*.test.mjs tests/xml/*.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: npm run build --silent && node --test --experimental-test-coverage tests/contract/*.test.mjs tests/certificado/*.test.mjs tests/golden/*.test.mjs tests/handler/*.test.mjs tests/pki/*.test.mjs tests/returns/*.test.mjs tests/xml/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run build --silent && npm run templates:check --silent && node --test tests/integration/*.test.mjs tests/integration/localstack/*.test.mjs tests/integration/retry/*.test.mjs tests/soap/*.test.mjs
